name: zelda-botw-encyclopedia

type: project
---
## zelda-botw-encyclopedia
Vite 5 + React 18 + TypeScript SPA
Korean UI, static data architecture via `src/data/*.ts` files
Deployable: `npm run build` outputs to `/dist`, deploy via Vercel/Netlify

### Current Data Scale (as of 2026-04-02)
- Monsters: 33종 (src/data/monsters.ts)
- Weapons: 38종 (src/data/weapons.ts) - 5 types: sword, spear, axe, bow, shield
- Armor: 48종 (src/data/armor.ts) - 3 slots: head, body, legs; multiple sets per race/effect
- Cooking: 37종 (src/data/recipes.ts)
- Shrines: 28종 (src/data/shrines.ts)
- Koroks: 45종 (src/data/koroks.ts) - 9 regions
- Divine Beasts: 4개
- Trials: 5개

### Pages (14 routes)
- / Dashboard, /monsters, /weapons, /armor, /cooking, /shrines, /divine-beasts, /trials, /koroks, /getting-started
- Detail: /monsters/:id, /weapons/:id, /armor/:id

### Key Components  
- DataTable<T> generic with sort, filter, onRowClick
- ItemCard for weapons grid display
- useSearch hook for real-time text filtering
- Dark theme Tailwind config

### UX Status
- List pages have clickable rows to detail pages
- Filters by type/slot/set/work/region
- No mobile support yet (fixed 240px sidebar)
- No localStorage/persistence
- Korok page uses imported data from koroks.ts
---
